title: crotalaria stenorhampha
intro: Crotalaria stenorhampha is a plant species belonging to the legume family, native to tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Crotalaria stenorhampha is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves or stems are used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
